executive_summary: GameStop's market cap of $7.9B sits well below the 52-week high; current price is $18.45 versus a high of $64.83.
investment_thesis: Revenue of $5.2B and a 92% bull-sentiment skew on StockTwits drive the meme-rally thesis.

future_projection: Consensus PT of $15 implies downside from the current $18.45.
business_description: GameStop operates video-game retail with revenue of $5.2B.
